articles.title: Dalal Street newbies using IPO muscle to beat down debt

topStories.title: St. Patrick’s Day at White House: Green-themed platters, shamrock cookies — what did the Irish spread include? Watch
topStories.description: During the reception, also marking the Irish American Heritage month, the Irish Taoiseach presented US President Donald Trump with ceremonial live shamrocks in a hand-cut Waterford Crystal bowl.

topStories.title: From Ali Larijani to Ali Khameini: Top of Iran’s power structure eliminated in US–Israel strikes
topStories.description: Gholamreza Rezaian, commander of Iran's Police Intelligence Organization, was killed in U.S. and Israeli airstrikes. Aziz Nasirzadeh, Iran's defense minister, and General Mohammad Pakpour, commander of the IRGC, also died in the attacks, along with other senior military officials.

topStories.title: Oil Price Today (March 18): Crude oil dips over 1% despite Iran war entering day 19. Here are two reasons why
topStories.description: Oil prices dipped Wednesday following a rise in US crude inventories. However, ongoing geopolitical tensions, particularly concerning the Strait of Hormuz, suggest prices may climb. Experts predict Brent crude could reach $120 or even $150 per barrel if the conflict persists.  This could impact global economies and prompt policy intervention.

topStories.title: Over 200 Ukrainian military experts in Gulf region to counter Iran’s drones
topStories.description: Ukraine President Zelenskyy says Moscow, Tehran 'brothers in hatred'; claims Iran's drones 'contain Russian components'.

topStories.title: BJP-NCP candidates secure top posts in Latur Zilla Parishad
topStories.description: The Zilla Parishad elections were held on February 7 and appointment of the president concluded on March 16

topStories.title: Xi Jinping’s anticorruption drive sweeps up senior Chinese military chiefs
topStories.description: Experts say rooting out corruption in the military remains a priority for China's President Xi.

topStories.title: Trump official Elbridge Colby's visit this month to revive India-US defence ties
topStories.description: New Delhi and Washington will discuss speeding up pending defence acquisitions and consider reviving forums like INDUS-X, people familiar with the matter said.

topStories.title: Assembly elections 2026 LIVE: ECI deploys over 1,000 Central observers for upcoming Assembly polls
topStories.description: Pradyut Bordoloi, the Congress MP from Assam's Nagaon Lok Sabha seat, quit the party following differences with State party president Gaurav Gogoi over candidate selection for the Laharighat Assembly constituency

topStories.title: Global Market Today | Asian stocks gain ahead of Fed rate decision, oil holds near $103
topStories.description: Asian equities opened higher, mirroring gains in US stocks and Treasuries as investors look past geopolitical tensions. Despite concerns over oil prices and inflation, markets show cautious optimism, with the Federal Reserve's interest-rate decision awaited. Continued volatility is expected until the energy situation stabilizes.

topStories.title: Who is Joe Kent, and why did he resign as Trump’s counterterrorism chief?
topStories.description: Kent is the highest-level official to leave Trump administration over the US president's decision to wage war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Experts discuss ‘Israeli strategy’ in killing of senior Iran official Ali L
dailyNews.description: Ross Harrison joins a panel on what the US and Israel are seeking with their killing of senior Iranian leaders.

dailyNews.description: Kent is the highest-level official to leave Trump administration over the US president's decision to wage war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Larijani’s warning to US, Israel before his killing
dailyNews.description: Ali Larijani, the late secretary of Iran’s SNSC, warned the US and Israeli that killing leaders would strengthen Iran.

dailyNews.title: Top court pushes govt for paternity leave framework
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court urged the government to establish a paternity leave framework, emphasizing its role in promoting gender equality and child welfare.

dailyNews.title: SC orders maternity leave for all adoptive mothers -- irrespective of age of child
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court ruled that all adoptive mothers are entitled to 12 weeks of maternity leave, regardless of the child's age, enhancing parental rights.

dailyNews.title: Dubai, Abu Dhabi, UAE News LIVE Updates: Blasts rock Dubai, US deploys bunker-buster bombs near Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Dubai, Abu Dhabi, UAE News LIVE: According to officials, the U.S.-Israeli war has resulted in at least 1,300 deaths in Iran, over 900 in Lebanon, and 12 in Israel.

dailyNews.title: Total repression and air strikes bring unrelenting dread for Iranians
dailyNews.description: Tehran residents tell the BBC they're caught between US-Israeli bombing and an Iranian regime trying to reassert its power.

dailyNews.title: Israel killed Larijani hoping to ‘torpedo’ chance of US-Iran talks
dailyNews.description: Marwan Bishara says Israel’s assassination of Larijani is calculated to prolong the war and bring about regime change.

dailyNews.title: Success or defeat of no-confidence motion is irrelevant
dailyNews.description: Congress lawmaker and senior advocate Abhishek Singhvi in an interview with HT speaks on cross-voting by members of his party in the just-concluded Rajya Sabha polls as well as multiple no-confidence notices the Opposition has brought against constitutional functionaries

dailyNews.title: Chile’s President Kast tosses out dozens of environmental protections
dailyNews.description: Chilean Environment Ministry suspends 43 measures touching on issues such as pollution, emissions and national parks.

dailyNews.title: Ireland’s Micheal Martin and Trump in awkward St Patrick’s Day exchange
dailyNews.description: Ireland, which took strong stance on Gaza genocide, is similarly robust on Iran, but Martin is criticised for passivity.

dailyNews.title: Argentina officially withdraws from World Health Organization, following US
dailyNews.description: Argentinian President Javier Milei has criticised the global health body for its response to the COVID-19 pandemic.

dailyNews.title: US Carrier Involved in Iran Fight Heads Back to Port After Fire
dailyNews.description: The USS Gerald R. Ford aircraft carrier is leaving the fight with Iran and heading back to port, a US official familiar with the matter said, after a fire broke out in its laundry area and left at least two sailors with non-life-threatening injuries.

dailyNews.title: Top US counterterrorism official resigns over Iran war, urging Trump to 'reverse course'
dailyNews.description: National Counterterrorism Center Director Joe Kent says Trump "started this war due to pressure from Israel and its powerful American lobby".

dailyNews.title: Trump says US does not ‘need’ Strait of Hormuz help, despite appeal
dailyNews.description: US president strikes defiant tone as allies reject joining coalition, does not name countries he said 'on their way'.

dailyNews.title: Rubio says Cuba needs to ‘get new people in charge’ as US ratchets pressure
dailyNews.description: Washington continues to block fuel to island nation, as Trump floats 'doing something with Cuba very soon'.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Next Decision in War: Whether to Retrieve Iran’s Nuclear Fuel
dailyNews.description: A mission to seize or destroy Iran’s nuclear material would be one of the riskiest military operations in modern American history.

dailyNews.title: Kharg Island Is an Appealing Target for Trump, With High Risks
dailyNews.description: A U.S. attack or a move to seize control of Iran’s main oil export hub could cripple the country’s ability to profit from its natural resources. But it would also risk sending energy prices even higher.

dailyNews.title: No Trump Endorsement for Cornyn or Paxton in Texas Senate Race as Deadline Passes
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s decision not to weigh in before the deadline means both John Cornyn and Ken Paxton remain on the ballot, extending their costly and increasingly personal battle into a May runoff.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Newsom Shouldn’t Be President Because He Is Dyslexic
dailyNews.description: President Trump said “a president should not have learning disabilities,” prompting criticism from a group that advocates equal opportunities for people with learning disabilities.

dailyNews.title: Why Did Trump Officials Award $2 Million to a Small Art School in Queens?
dailyNews.description: The National Endowment for the Humanities seldom gave seven-figure grants. Now big awards flow to handpicked projects, including an institution with three full-time employees.

dailyNews.title: Israel targets more Iran leaders as allies reject Trump's calls for help
dailyNews.description: Israel says it killed Iran's top security official Ali Larijani, as America's European allies reject President Trump's demands for help in the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Senate votes to begin marathon debate over SAVE America Act
dailyNews.description: The Senate voted to begin a marathon debate on the SAVE America Act, an elections bill that President Trump has been pressing Republicans to pass.

dailyNews.title: See full results for 2026 Illinois primary elections
dailyNews.description: Candidates for governor, U.S. Senate, U.S. House, and Cook County Board President were among the races on the ballot in the 2026 Illinois primary election on Tuesday.

dailyNews.title: As Trump floats "taking Cuba," island's president warns of "resistance"
dailyNews.description: The leader of Cuba is vowing to put up "resistance" against the U.S. as President Trump suggests he may "take" the island nation, whose communist government has faced intense U.S. pressure and languished under energy shortages.

dailyNews.title: 3/9: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: Trump tells CBS war in Iran is "pretty much" complete; two charged in "ISIS-inspired" attack outside New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's home.
